creator: mike@FreeBSD.org
text:
Adding to Audit-Trail.

On Sat, Jul 21, 2001 at 11:05:26PM -0400, Martin E. Kokkelink wrote:
> 
> i'v actually isolated the problem down to a really obscure hardware conflict
> between my poor soyo motherboard and my unreliable ati video card. i'v
> actually got two dlink via-rhine compat cards in a 3.4 system right now and
> everything is fine.
>
